fixes.origin:
src = os.path.join(source_root, item)
dst = os.path.join(dest_root, item)

shutil.copyfile(src, dst)
fixes.replacement:
p = Path(item)
if p.suffix not in {".txt", ".log"} or p.name != item:
    raise ValueError("invalid sync entry")

src = os.path.join(source_root, item)
dst = os.path.join(dest_root, item)

shutil.copyfile(src, dst)
